requirement_topic.en: ERA and Utility Grid-Connection Review — Anti-Islanding, 50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V Settings, and Commissioning Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: ERA及公用事业并网审查——防孤岛、50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V参数及投运证据
requirement_topic.zht: ERA及公用事業併網審查——防孤島、50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V參數及投運證據

summary.en: Uganda grid-tied solar PV projects should be treated as project-level approvals involving ERA licensing or permit review where applicable, plus connection acceptance by the relevant network operator. ERA publishes licensing procedures and electricity-sector guidelines and standards, including renewable-energy feed-in-tariff and off-grid / isolated-grid instruments. For inverter documentation, the practical technical file should include IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, protection settings, harmonic and power-quality evidence, and commissioning records mapped to Uganda's 50 Hz, 240/415 V supply. Distribution connection is commonly handled by UMEME or UEDCL depending on the service area and current concession arrangements; transmission-scale projects should also check UETCL interface requirements.
summary.zh: 乌干达并网太阳能光伏项目应视为项目级审批：在适用情况下涉及ERA许可证或许可审查，并需由相关网络运营方接受接入。ERA发布许可程序以及电力行业指南和标准，包括可再生能源上网电价、离网和孤立电网文件。逆变器技术文件实际应包括IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、保护参数、谐波和电能质量证据，以及映射至乌干达50 Hz、240/415 V供电条件的投运记录。配电接入通常由UMEME或UEDCL根据服务区域及现行特许安排处理；输电级项目还应核查UETCL接口要求。
summary.zht: 烏干達併網太陽能光伏項目應視為項目級審批：在適用情況下涉及ERA許可證或許可審查，並需由相關網路營運方接受接入。ERA發布許可程序以及電力行業指南和標準，包括可再生能源上網電價、離網和孤立電網文件。逆變器技術文件實際應包括IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、保護參數、諧波和電能品質證據，以及映射至烏干達50 Hz、240/415 V供電條件的投運記錄。配電接入通常由UMEME或UEDCL根據服務區域及現行特許安排處理；輸電級項目還應核查UETCL介面要求。

standards_or_laws: ERA licensing procedure and electricity-sector regulatory instruments
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Uganda low-voltage supply context — 50 Hz, 240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase
UMEME / UEDCL / UETCL connection and commissioning requirements, as applicable to the project

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid protection settings. These documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and Chinese approval processes. They may support technical review but do not grant ERA approval, UMEME/UEDCL connection acceptance, UETCL interface acceptance, or a Ugandan commissioning sign-off.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021以及国家电网或南方电网保护参数。这些文件基于中国电网条件和中国审批流程。它们可支持技术审查，但不授予ERA审批、UMEME/UEDCL接入接受、UETCL接口接受或乌干达投运签署。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021以及國家電網或南方電網保護參數。這些文件基於中國電網條件和中國審批流程。它們可支持技術審查，但不授予ERA審批、UMEME/UEDCL接入接受、UETCL介面接受或烏干達投運簽署。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China grid reports and firmware settings do not transfer automatically to Uganda. Exporters should prepare a Uganda-specific grid file covering anti-islanding, voltage and frequency trip windows, reconnection delay, ride-through behavior where required, harmonics, protection coordination, settings lockout, and commissioning evidence. Firmware should be parameterised and documented for Uganda's 240/415 V, 50 Hz network rather than left at China 220/380 V defaults.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网报告和固件参数不会自动转移至乌干达。出口商应准备乌干达专用并网文件，涵盖防孤岛、电压和频率脱扣窗口、重连延迟、在要求时的故障穿越行为、谐波、保护配合、参数锁定及投运证据。固件应按乌干达240/415 V、50 Hz网络设定参数并记录，而非保留中国220/380 V默认值。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網報告和韌體參數不會自動轉移至烏干達。出口商應準備烏干達專用併網文件，涵蓋防孤島、電壓和頻率脫扣窗口、重連延遲、在要求時的故障穿越行為、諧波、保護配合、參數鎖定及投運證據。韌體應按烏干達240/415 V、50 Hz網路設定參數並記錄，而非保留中國220/380 V預設值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a practical project gate for grid-connected systems to the extent required by ERA licensing, the relevant distribution or transmission utility, the connection agreement, and commissioning procedures.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China grid-code evidence supports technical comparison but does not create Ugandan utility permission to connect.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Uganda grid connection as a separate project gate from China grid approval. Map the inverter's IEC 62116, IEC 61727, protection, harmonics, and commissioning evidence to ERA and the relevant UMEME, UEDCL, or UETCL connection file before energization.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将乌干达并网接入视为独立于中国并网批准的项目门槛。通电前，应将逆变器的IEC 62116、IEC 61727、保护、谐波和投运证据映射至ERA及相关UMEME、UEDCL或UETCL接入文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將烏干達併網接入視為獨立於中國併網批准的項目門檻。通電前，應將逆變器的IEC 62116、IEC 61727、保護、諧波和投運證據映射至ERA及相關UMEME、UEDCL或UETCL接入文件。

requirement_topic.en: Uganda Solar Project Context — Hydro-Dominant Grid, C&I Solar, Off-Grid, Mini-Grid, and GET FiT Experience
requirement_topic.zh: 乌干达太阳能项目背景——水电主导电网、工商业太阳能、离网、微电网及GET FiT经验
requirement_topic.zht: 烏干達太陽能項目背景——水電主導電網、工商業太陽能、離網、微電網及GET FiT經驗

summary.en: Uganda's generation mix is strongly shaped by Nile hydro assets such as Bujagali and Karuma, while solar PV has developed through utility, C&I, off-grid, mini-grid, and rural-electrification channels. ERA lists renewable-energy feed-in-tariff and off-grid / isolated-grid guidance among its regulatory instruments. For a Chinese inverter supplier, this means the compliance path is project-specific: an off-grid or mini-grid inverter may face different ERA, UNBS, installer, and commissioning evidence from a grid-exporting C&I or utility-scale inverter.
summary.zh: 乌干达发电结构深受尼罗河水电资产（如Bujagali和Karuma）影响，同时太阳能光伏通过公用事业、工商业、离网、微电网和农村电气化渠道发展。ERA在监管文件中列有可再生能源上网电价以及离网/孤立电网指南。对中国逆变器供应商而言，这意味着合规路径取决于项目：离网或微电网逆变器面对的ERA、UNBS、安装方和投运证据，可能不同于向电网送电的工商业或公用事业级逆变器。
summary.zht: 烏干達發電結構深受尼羅河水電資產（如Bujagali和Karuma）影響，同時太陽能光伏通過公用事業、工商業、離網、微電網和農村電氣化渠道發展。ERA在監管文件中列有可再生能源上網電價以及離網／孤立電網指南。對中國逆變器供應商而言，這意味著合規路徑取決於項目：離網或微電網逆變器面對的ERA、UNBS、安裝方和投運證據，可能不同於向電網送電的工商業或公用事業級逆變器。

standards_or_laws: ERA Uganda Renewable Energy Feed-In-Tariff guidelines
Project-specific utility and owner technical specifications

summary.en: China distributed PV and utility-scale PV evidence is developed under Chinese policy, grid-operator rules, and domestic standards such as NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, and GB/T 19964-2024. Those files should be treated as product and engineering inputs only; they do not identify the Ugandan project category or the local approval pathway.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏和公用事业级光伏证据依据中国政策、电网运营方规则及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024等国内标准形成。这些文件只能作为产品和工程输入，不识别乌干达项目类别或本地审批路径。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏和公用事業級光伏證據依據中國政策、電網營運方規則及NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024等國內標準形成。這些文件只能作為產品和工程輸入，不識別烏干達項目類別或本地審批路徑。

standards_or_laws: Chinese grid operator distributed PV and utility-scale PV procedures

gap.en: Gap: The first Uganda decision is not only product testing; it is identifying the project pathway. Determine whether the inverter is for import resale, an off-grid system, an isolated mini-grid, C&I self-consumption, net export, or a utility-scale plant, then align the evidence package to UNBS, ERA, the relevant utility, and the project owner.
gap.zh: 差距：乌干达的首要判断不只是产品测试，而是识别项目路径。应先确定逆变器用于进口转售、离网系统、孤立微电网、工商业自用、上网送电还是公用事业级电站，再将证据包对齐UNBS、ERA、相关公用事业和项目业主要求。
gap.zht: 差距：烏干達的首要判斷不只是產品測試，而是識別項目路徑。應先確定逆變器用於進口轉售、離網系統、孤立微電網、工商業自用、上網送電還是公用事業級電站，再將證據包對齊UNBS、ERA、相關公用事業和項目業主要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; ERA, utility, and project-owner requirements differ between off-grid, isolated-grid, C&I, and grid-exporting systems.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China project categories and approvals do not classify the Uganda project pathway.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Classify the Uganda solar project before relying on any Chinese inverter certificate. Off-grid, mini-grid, C&I, and grid-exporting projects can trigger different ERA, utility, and owner review gates even when the same inverter model is used.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在依赖任何中国逆变器证书前，应先对乌干达太阳能项目分类。即使使用同一逆变器型号，离网、微电网、工商业和上网送电项目也可能触发不同的ERA、公用事业及业主审查门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在依賴任何中國逆變器證書前，應先對烏干達太陽能項目分類。即使使用同一逆變器型號，離網、微電網、工商業和上網送電項目也可能觸發不同的ERA、公用事業及業主審查門檻。
